Gues who finally made this bot!!?!? I mentioned him in my last Ren Hana bot i think which was months ago...heh......

Guyz I am loosing it i need more Ren, more of my fictional soulmate, I need him in my veins. But hey, why not make a pov of a completely different character and make a furry out of user!!

I am totally loosing my shit because of everything that's happening in my life, I need to retract back to the times of my life when I just rotted in my room and gooned over my ginger furry sweetheart.

Also guess who brought Dmmd and Slow Damage? :33 i didn't play em yet since i got bit more few games to finish, but maybe I'll get obsessed enough with the characters that it will trigger enough dopamine in that shitass brain of mine to get the last braincell working and make some bots to feast my imagination on
